situation.noActiveEvents: There are currently no active international events.
situation.pushReformsHint: Continue pushing domestic demand, industry, and external expansion to trigger reform milestones at levels 5/10.

settlement.title: Fiscal Settlement
settlement.readonlyHint: This phase is read-only, showing how this round's income flows back into consumer purchasing power, factories, and government finance.
settlement.domesticSalesHint: Domestic market sales revenue for this round.
settlement.overseasSalesHint: Overseas market sales revenue for this round.
settlement.colonyIncomeHint: Additional income from controlled regions in this fiscal settlement.
settlement.nationalIncomeHint: Total market sales revenue for this round.
settlement.nationalIncomeHintWithColony: Combined market sales and controlled-region income.
settlement.effectiveRatioHint: Sale income returns to consumer purchasing power, factory budget, and government finance by this round's effective ratio.
settlement.cumulativeIncomeHint: Final core metric, including this round's settled income.
settlement.cumulativeIncomeHintFinal: After settlement, the final archive will be entered.
settlement.cumulativeIncomeHintNext: After settlement, the next round of national decisions will begin.
settlement.consumerPurchasingPowerHint: This round's share allocated to consumer purchasing power; settlement adds it into next round's domestic consumption pool.
settlement.consumerPurchasingPowerFrozenHint: Consumer purchasing power receives its income-allocation share and affects next-round domestic equilibrium price.
settlement.factoryBudgetHint: This round's share allocated to the factory budget pool.
settlement.governmentFiscalHint: This round's share allocated to the government finance pool.
settlement.consumptionPoolFormula: Previous balance {{prev}} fiscal + this-round return {{add}} fiscal = next-round consumer purchasing power {{remainder}} fiscal.
settlement.previousBalanceHint: Previous round consumer purchasing power balance.
settlement.newAllocationHint: Portion of this round's income allocated to consumer purchasing power at the current {{ratio}} ratio.
settlement.newAllocationFrozenHint: National income returns to consumer purchasing power by the allocation ratio.
settlement.remainderHint: Next-round consumer purchasing power after settlement.
settlement.highlightFirstWithIncome: {{country}} finished first with {{income}} cumulative national income.
settlement.highlightDefault: The match is over. Use the final rankings and logs to review the full arc.
settlement.heroDescriptionHasResult: This summarizes the final ranking, key results, and final timeline so you can quickly review how the match concluded.
settlement.heroDescriptionNoResult: There is no result to display yet. Return to the lobby or original room and re-enter later.
settlement.missingResult: There is no match result to display yet. Return to the lobby or original room and re-enter.
settlement.tieBreakSummary: Production capacity: {{production}}, controlled regions: {{regions}}, total resources: {{budget}}
settlement.whyRankChangedSingle: {{country}} focused on steady growth this game and defended its lead to the end.
settlement.whyRankChangedCatchUp: Next game, gain tempo first, secure market access, and turn the gap into next-round space.
settlement.whyRankChangedTwo1: {{country}} focused on steady growth this game, ending with cumulative national income {{income}}, leading {{secondCountry}} by {{diff}}.
settlement.whyRankChangedTwo2: If {{country}} wants to catch up, first gain tempo and then secure market access to create space for the next round.
settlement.replayGuidanceSingle1: Next game, continue steady growth to keep the income chain and turn the lead into next-round space.
settlement.replayGuidanceSingle2: If you want to accelerate expansion, first gain tempo and confirm you still hold market access.
settlement.replayGuidanceTwo1: If you are {{country}}, first gain tempo and then secure market access - don't let your lead stay only within the phase.
settlement.replayGuidanceTwo2: If you are {{country}}, continue steady growth and roll the advantage into later rounds for bigger next-round space.

market.title: Market Sales Desk
market.marketNetAdjustmentHint: Current market adjustment from events, existing state, or competition
market.openMarketNoCompetition: Open markets can receive direct allocation; contests only depend on army and region blockades.
market.noAllocationPriceNote: No domestic allocation yet: formula reference price {{reference}}, domestic capacity {{softCap}}, floor {{minimum}}.
market.domesticReferenceCalculation: Consumer purchasing power {{pool}} ÷ domestic capacity {{softCap}} = normal unit price {{reference}}.
market.domesticAllocationCalculation: This-round allocation {{allocation}}, crowding factor 2 - {{allocation}} / {{softCap}} = {{factor}}; pre-clamp price {{beforeFloor}}, price range {{minimum}} to {{maximum}}, so estimated unit price {{price}}, revenue {{sold}} × {{price}} = {{revenue}}.
market.domesticAllocationEmptyCalculation: No domestic goods allocated yet. Select an allocation to recalculate from volume; price is clamped between {{minimum}} and {{maximum}}.
market.fixedOverseasPriceNote: Allocated {{quantity}}, actually sold {{sold}} (contest capacity {{rewardSold}} / shared capacity {{sharedSold}}); revenue = {{sold}} × fixed price {{price}} = {{revenue}}.
market.fixedOverseasPriceLockedNote: Fixed price {{price}}, but this region cannot receive sales now; allocation {{quantity}} resolves as 0 sold and 0 revenue, capacity counts as 0.
market.overseasCapacityCalculation: Allocated {{quantity}}; shared overseas capacity this round {{sharedCapacity}}, contest extra capacity here {{rewardCapacity}}, actual sold {{sold}}.
market.overseasRevenueCalculation: Revenue = actual sold {{sold}} × fixed regional price {{price}} = {{revenue}}.
market.overseasPriceNote: Fixed regional price {{price}}; revenue = sold quantity × fixed price.
market.competitionCaptureNote: If contest succeeds: extra sellable capacity +{{capacity}}{{estimated}}{{minPower}}
market.routeBlockedEffect: Cannot sell to this region; capacity counts as 0.
market.routeBlockedResolution: Assign more fleets to this region, break the opposing regional blockade, or wait for event / policy changes.

military.title: Military Fortress
military.fleetRuleNote: Deployable fleets = existing fleets + selected fleet builds - deployed fleets. To blockade an overseas market, open a specific region and assign fleets there.
military.oceanBlockadeEffectByYou: You blockade this region; you can sell to it, while other countries cannot sell there.
military.oceanBlockadeEffectByOther: {{country}} blockades this region; {{country}} can sell to it, while other countries, including you, cannot sell there.
military.lootHint: This legacy resource-transfer action is disabled.
military.conquestBenefit: This legacy region-control action is disabled.
military.independenceHint: The legacy independence chain is disabled.
military.overseasRegionStatusDesc: Shows overseas regions and region blockades; overseas sales are open by default and limited by inventory, capacity, and whether the target region is blockaded.
military.regionBlockadeByYou: You are blockading this region; you can still sell here, while other countries cannot sell to this region.
military.regionBlockadeByOther: {{country}} is blockading this region; countries other than {{country}} cannot sell to this region.
military.regionBlockadeQueued: {{count}} fleet(s) assigned to this region; with {{threshold}} or more fleets and a unique lead, other countries cannot sell to this region.
military.regionBlockadeRule: Blockade rule: assign fleets to the same region. A country monopolizes the region only with {{threshold}} or more fleets and a unique lead; if multiple countries target it, the higher fleet count wins, and ties create no blockade.
military.regionBlockadeNone: No country is blockading this region.
military.navalBuildingDesc: Expand your fleet to directly increase overseas capacity and power projection.
military.armyRecruitmentDesc: Replenish army and heavy weapons to enhance military influence.
military.supportActionDesc: Overseas regions are open by default; military actions supplement this round's overseas projection and deterrence.

research.notResearching: Click a technology on the right to select a research target. Research begins after submitting your decision.
research.progressFull: Progress full; the first discoverer attempts breakthrough during settlement. Failure retains progress and continues next round.
research.catchUpReady: Catch-up progress is full; next settlement unlocks directly without a die roll.
research.autoConfirm: Active research is auto-confirmed for this step; you can submit the decision without changing the target.
research.breakthroughCheck: Current breakthrough check: at settlement, randomly roll a number from 1-{{die}}; {{threshold}} or higher succeeds
research.catchUpDirectUnlock: Another country has discovered this technology; reach {{target}} progress to unlock it directly without a die roll.
research.advanceMethodValueReadable: Each research facility: +{{progress}} progress per turn
research.breakthroughDieValue: First discoverer: random number from 1-{{die}} at settlement
research.breakthroughSummary1: Only the first discoverer of each technology rolls the breakthrough die
research.breakthroughSummary2: The first researcher unlocks only if the die result reaches the effective threshold
research.breakthroughSummary3: First-research failure retains progress; each failure lowers next effective threshold by 1, minimum 1
research.breakthroughSummary4: If another country has already discovered this technology, later countries do not roll and unlock directly at the original threshold
research.breakthroughStepProgress: After selecting a technology and submitting, your research facilities begin advancing it; each facility adds {{progress}} progress per turn.
research.breakthroughStepFirstDiscovery: When progress reaches that technology's requirement, the first country to get there receives a random check number from 1-{{die}} at settlement.
research.breakthroughStepFailure: If the check number meets the target, the technology unlocks. If not, progress is kept and the next breakthrough becomes easier until it succeeds.
research.breakthroughStepCatchUp: If another country has already discovered this technology, you unlock it directly once your progress catches up, without a random breakthrough check.
research.clickToResearch: Click unlock button to start researching
research.selectedAndSubmit: Selected; research begins after submitting decision

factory.title: Industrial Zone
factory.constructionLine: Production line, increases subsequent production capacity.
factory.productionDesc: Raw materials, factory budget, and capacity limit together constrain this round's output.
factory.materialPurchaseDesc: Spend factory budget to buy raw materials usable this round without changing natural material growth.
factory.materialPurchaseEffect: Each purchased raw material immediately increases this round's allocatable materials and spends factory budget.
factory.productionRoutesHint: Prioritize allocating raw materials to unlocked routes with higher output ratios.
factory.capacityWarning: {{count}} raw materials exceed current capacity; increase factories or upgrade production lines first.
factory.budgetWarning: Factory budget is insufficient; no more production can be scheduled.
factory.dispatchCapacityWarning: Industry actions use {{count}} capacity; increase factories or upgrade production lines first.
factory.factoryIncreaseDescription: Expand {{target}} factories: add {{delta}} capacity this round; limited only by national total cap, idle slots, budget, and tech prerequisites.
factory.newFactoryIncreaseDescription: Legacy build compatibility: directly builds {{target}} and is usable this round.
factory.industryUpgradeDescription: {{source}} -> {{target}}: each order consumes {{delta}} {{source}} capacity and immediately converts it into {{delta}} {{target}} capacity; usable this round and total factories do not increase.
factory.factoryIncreaseLockedDescription: Expansion directly builds {{target}} this round. Prerequisite: unlock {{target}} ({{tech}}) and keep an idle slot in the national factory pool.
factory.factoryIncreaseUnavailableDescription: Expansion directly builds {{target}} this round. Currently unavailable: total cap, idle slot, budget, or tech prerequisite is not met.
factory.industryUpgradeUnavailableDescription: Industry Upgrade = {{source}} -> {{target}}. Prerequisite: {{prerequisite}}; execution consumes 1 {{source}} factory and immediately converts it into 1 {{target}} factory.
factory.baseStageNoUpgradeDescription: Industry Upgrade converts the previous-stage factory into this stage. Handicraft starts from idle factory capacity.
factory.noFactoryIncreasePath: No factory increase path for this stage

domestic.title: Citizen Square
domestic.domesticEconomyDesc: Current domestic demand, pricing soft cap, and equilibrium price. Final transaction price is recalculated from actual allocation in the sales phase.
domestic.domesticEconomyDescWithValues: Normal unit price starts from domestic purchasing power and normal-price sales volume: {{pool}} ÷ {{capacity}} ≈ {{price}} fiscal per good. Selling fewer goods creates shortage and raises price; overselling creates surplus and lowers price; range {{minimum}} to {{maximum}}.
domestic.governmentAdjustmentHint: Market adjustments currently in effect this round.
domestic.noGovernmentMarketPolicy: No market adjustment selected this round
domestic.referencePriceFormula: Consumer purchasing power {{pool}} ÷ pricing soft cap {{capacity}} = equilibrium reference price {{price}}
domestic.referencePricePlain: Domestic purchasing power {{pool}} fiscal, normal-price sales volume {{capacity}} goods. Normal unit price = {{pool}} ÷ {{capacity}} ≈ {{price}} fiscal per good.
domestic.allocationPricePlain: This is not the final transaction price. The sales page still checks actual allocation: fewer goods raise the price; too many goods push price down, clamped between {{minimum}} and {{maximum}} fiscal per good.
domestic.impactSurplusFeeling: Dumping goods; market cannot absorb them
domestic.noMarketRegulation: No market regulation. The sales phase will use base supply/demand, existing events, and inherited effects for pricing.
domestic.priceNoteHint: Trade Port will recalculate transaction price based on actual allocation volume

government.title: Parliament Hall
government.marketRegulationDesc: Select market strategies; costs are deducted directly from fiscal budget. Strategies affect domestic/overseas market capacity, prices, and handicrafts.
government.marketBaselineDesc: After selecting strategies below, capacity, equilibrium reference price, and peacetime overseas sales capacity will update in real-time.
government.marketPriceHint: Trade details: capacity, price, and overseas sales will update per actual allocation at settlement.
government.sellPhaseNote: Sales phase will reprice based on actual allocation, base supply/demand, and existing effects.
government.ideologyHighestAlert: Any ideology reaching {{threshold}} enters highest alert; in this version it is a risk notice only and does not trigger extra revolution settlement.
government.atMaxStage: At maximum stage; this version treats it as a risk notice only, with no extra settlement
government.reformPathNote: Admin remaining this round {{admin}} · Highest Alert {{threshold}}{{overflow}}
government.buyAdminDesc: Permanently convert government fiscal into admin capacity. The new admin is available immediately for reforms or policies this round.
government.reformAndPolicyDesc: Implementing reforms advances national identity along three paths; regular policies spend this round's admin and budget.
government.activePoliciesHint: Policies are selected by round; admin refreshes next round.
government.activablePoliciesHint: Spend this round's admin and budget
government.buyMilitaryPointsDesc: Convert fiscal to military points for recruitment, fleet, and fortress actions after submission.
government.phaseHeaderDecisionDesc: Convert factory budget and government fiscal into production, market regulation, and national governance, while syncing domestic purchasing power.
government.phaseHeaderMarketDesc: Allocate inventory to domestic and overseas markets, directly generating this round's national income.
government.phaseHeaderSettlementDesc: The system will flow income back into consumer purchasing power, factories, and government finance according to the current allocation ratio, generating the next round's structural baseline.
government.syncingPhaseDesc: Syncing current phase data; you will be able to operate shortly.
government.policyEffectsDeferred: Effects start from next round's settlement; won't immediately add military action points this round.
government.policyDescWithMilitaryDelay: {{desc}} Effects start from next round's settlement; won't immediately add military action points this round.

strategy.tradePromotionDesc: Spend administrative power coordinating trade channels, permanently increasing overseas market capacity.

submit.alreadySubmittedMsg: You have already submitted for this phase; wait for settlement.
submit.phaseMismatch: Current phase has changed; please refresh.
submit.gameNotFound: Game does not exist or has ended.
submit.notRoomMember: You are no longer in this room; cannot submit.
submit.invalidSession: Session expired; please log in again.
submit.recoveryNotAvailable: Cannot recover game state; please refresh.
submit.errorExpansionNotUnlocked: Production route {{route}} is not unlocked and cannot be expanded.
submit.errorUpgradeNeedsTech: Production route {{route}} needs upgrade technology first.
submit.errorUpgradeNoCapacity: Production route {{route}} has no source capacity available for upgrade.

flow.statusFinalResult: Final results generated, entering settlement page.
flow.statusRestoring: Restoring current round and phase, please wait.
flow.statusViewResults: This phase has completed settlement; please review results and wait for the next phase.
flow.statusWaitingSettlement: You have submitted; the system will settle once all players have completed.
flow.statusEditable: You can now fill in and submit this phase's operations.
flow.statusViewingSituation: Please review the current situation before deciding on this phase's operations.
flow.titleFinished: This game has ended; entering results page.
flow.titleFinishedDesc: Final results have been generated; you will be redirected to the results page shortly.
flow.titleSyncingDesc: Please wait; the system is restoring the current round, phase, and your actionable content.
flow.titleSettledDesc: Review the results below before preparing new arrangements for the current phase.
flow.titleAutoSubmitted: You missed the deadline; the system has submitted on your behalf
flow.titleAutoSubmittedDescPending: This phase has been auto-submitted per timeout rules; if other players have not yet submitted, waiting continues. Once all are done, the system will settle and display phase results before advancing.
flow.titleAutoSubmittedDescSettling: This phase has been auto-submitted per timeout rules; the system is now settling. After settlement, phase results will be displayed before advancing to the next phase.
flow.titleWaitingPlayers: You have submitted; waiting for other players to complete this phase
flow.titleWaitingPlayersDesc: You have completed this phase's submission. Waiting for {{count}} player(s) to submit; after settlement, phase results will be displayed before advancing to the next phase.
flow.titleSystemSettling: All players submitted; system is settling
flow.titleSystemSettlingDesc: All players have completed their operations; the system is aggregating this phase's results. After settlement, phase results will be displayed before advancing to the next phase.
flow.titleActionable: It's now your turn to complete {{phase}} arrangements
flow.titleActionableDesc: After confirming your phase operations are correct, you can submit. The system will settle once all players have completed.
flow.titleUnavailableDesc: Please review the phase objectives and result feedback, waiting for the system to sync to an actionable state.
flow.rhythmAllSubmitted: All players have completed their operations; the system is aggregating this phase's actions and preparing to advance.
flow.rhythmAutoSubmitted: Your phase has been locked and submitted by the system; all you can do now is wait for other players or system advancement.
flow.rhythmWaiting: Once all players submit, the system will automatically settle and advance to the next phase.
flow.rhythmSettled: First confirm what happened in the previous phase, then decide whether to adjust your operational strategy this round.
flow.rhythmActionable: After completing your arrangements on the left, confirm submission here; after submitting, you will enter the waiting-for-settlement state.
flow.validateWaitingSync: Waiting for current phase data sync.
flow.validateSettlementNoCheck: Fiscal settlement phase has no player hard constraints to confirm.
flow.validateNoBlocking: Current draft does not violate any hard constraints.
flow.validateFactoryOverBudget: Factory plan spending {{spend}} exceeds factory budget {{budget}}.
flow.validateDomesticOverBudget: Legacy domestic market action spending {{spend}} exceeds consumer purchasing power {{budget}}.
flow.validateGovernmentOverBudget: Government action spending {{spend}} exceeds government fiscal budget {{budget}}.
flow.validateBaseFiscalInsufficient: Government fiscal budget exceeded: planned {{needed}}, available {{base}}.
flow.validateRawMaterialOverAllocated: Raw material allocation {{assigned}} exceeds available raw materials {{available}}.
flow.validateLegacyBatchOverCapacity: {{label}} scheduled {{allocated}} batches exceeds this round's shared capacity {{available}}.
flow.validateMilitaryOverMaxPerRound: {{label}} scheduled {{count}} times exceeds this round's limit of {{max}}.
flow.validateMarketDomesticOverDemand: Domestic sales {{allocated}} exceeds this round's demand {{demand}}.
flow.validateCompetitionDuplicateRegion: {{region}} can only submit one set of competition forces per round.
flow.validateCompetitionInvalidRegion: {{region}} is not a valid overseas region.
flow.submitTitleSettlement: No Player Submission in this Phase
flow.submitSettlementDesc: The fiscal settlement phase is automatically advanced by the system; no player submission required.
flow.submitAllReady: All critical steps are confirmed here for final verification.
flow.submitAlreadySubmitted: You have completed this phase's submission; waiting for system settlement.
flow.submitAutoSubmitted: You did not complete operations before the deadline; the system has auto-confirmed the current phase arrangements.
flow.submitFactorySpend: Factory estimated spend {{factory}}; Domestic estimated spend {{domestic}}; Government estimated spend {{government}}.
flow.submitMarketRevenue: Estimated domestic revenue {{domestic}}; Estimated overseas revenue {{overseas}}.
flow.submitAutoAdvance: The system will automatically advance to the next round of National Decision.
flow.resourcesContextWaiting: Waiting for current phase resource sync.
flow.checklistMarketPhase: Market: no sale orders configured (not required)
flow.validateSettlementNoConstraints: Settlement phase: no constraints to validate

backendLabels.举世瞩目的博览会，国内外市场全面繁荣。: A spectacular exposition that brings prosperity to domestic and overseas markets.
backendLabels.举办商品博览会，低成本扩大本回合国内承接量。: Hold a trade fair to expand domestic market capacity this round at low cost.
backendLabels.举办商品博览会，永久提高国内市场承接上限。: Hold a trade fair, permanently increasing domestic market capacity.
backendLabels.从政府财政建设一所研究院，永久增加每回合研究进度。: Build a research academy from government fiscal, permanently increasing research progress per round.
backendLabels.以全球霸权地位垄断国际贸易，所有海外商品大幅溢价。: Monopolize international trade through global hegemony, significantly increasing overseas goods premiums.
backendLabels.以全球霸权地位垄断国际贸易，永久提高海外市场承接上限，并在本轮提高海外商品溢价。: Monopolize international trade through global hegemony, permanently increasing overseas market capacity and raising overseas premiums this round.
backendLabels.以宪法约束国家权力，降低三类激进思潮，减少革命风险。: Constrain state power with a constitution, reducing all three radical ideologies and revolutionary risk.
backendLabels.优化税收体系，增加政府收入并刺激国内消费。: Optimize the tax system to increase government revenue and stimulate domestic consumption.
backendLabels.保护发明和技术产权，为私人研发与工业升级政策提供制度基础。: Protect inventions and technical property rights, providing an institutional foundation for private R&D and industrial upgrade policies.
backendLabels.免费将最多 2 点机械化产能升级为蒸汽工业。: Upgrade up to 2 mechanized capacity to steam industry for free.
backendLabels.全球性经济衰退，消费和工业全面萎缩。: Global economic recession, consumption and industry shrink across the board.
backendLabels.全面动员国家战争机器，军事、海外全方位碾压。: Fully mobilize the national war machine, achieving comprehensive military and overseas dominance.
backendLabels.关键原材料供应紧张，工厂投入成本上升。: Critical raw material supply tightens, raising factory input costs.
backendLabels.关闭贸易口岸保护国内市场，产能下降但收入向工厂倾斜。: Close trade ports to protect the domestic market; capacity drops but income shifts toward factories.
backendLabels.军民融合发展，军事能力与海外贸易价格同步提升。: Military-civilian integration boosts both military capability and overseas trade prices.
backendLabels.农作物歉收，食品价格上涨但市场承接力下降。: Crop failures raise food prices but reduce market capacity.
backendLabels.列强争相瓜分非洲殖民地，军事扩张与民族情绪并起。: Powers race to expand overseas trade networks; military projection and nationalism surge together.
backendLabels.列强争相扩展海外贸易网络，军事投送与民族情绪并起。: Great powers race to expand overseas trade networks; military projection and nationalism rise together.
backendLabels.列强军备竞赛白热化，军事力量急剧膨胀。: The great power arms race intensifies, military strength swells rapidly.
backendLabels.列强海军扩张竞赛，军事力量增强但财政负担加重。: Great powers engage in naval expansion race; military strength grows but fiscal burden increases.
backendLabels.发现大型煤矿，工业投资获得额外资金。: Major coal deposits discovered, bringing additional industrial investment funds.
backendLabels.各国举办工业博览会，商品价格和需求双双上升。: Nations hold industrial expositions; both goods prices and demand rise.
backendLabels.各国互派间谍窃取工业机密，科技外泄。: Spies steal industrial secrets across nations; technology leaks abroad.
backendLabels.各国港口扩建完成，海上贸易能力提升。: Port expansions completed across nations, boosting maritime trade capacity.
backendLabels.各国协调港务与航路标准，临时提升海外承接能力。: Nations coordinate port operations and shipping standards, temporarily increasing overseas capacity.
backendLabels.各国贸易谈判破裂，海外出口受限但国内需求转移。: Trade negotiations collapse; overseas exports restricted but domestic demand shifts.
backendLabels.培育国内消费文化，大幅提升商品附加值。: Cultivate domestic consumer culture, significantly increasing goods value-added.
backendLabels.培育高端消费市场，提高国内商品收购价格，但收益不再压过完整军事路线。: Cultivate high-end consumer markets, raising domestic purchase prices without overshadowing full military investment.
backendLabels.大规模油田被发现，工业和出口前景大好。: Massive oil fields discovered; bright prospects for industry and exports.
backendLabels.大量移民涌入，国内消费市场扩张。: Mass immigration expands the domestic consumer market.
backendLabels.完成代议制转型，大幅缓和三类思潮压力，降低接近革命阈值的风险。: Complete representative transformation, greatly easing all three ideological pressures and reducing revolutionary risk.
backendLabels.将三项意识形态重置为 3，并使你选定的一项额外 +3。: Reset all three ideologies to 3, and add +3 to your chosen one.
backendLabels.将所有闲置产能转化为手工业，并提升平等主义。: Convert all idle capacity to handicraft and boost egalitarianism.
backendLabels.工厂工人罢工要求改善待遇，工业投资受损。: Factory workers strike for better conditions; industrial investment suffers.
backendLabels.建立义务教育体系，每回合额外获得科技点，适合长期研发。: Establish compulsory education; gain additional tech points per round, ideal for long-term research.
backendLabels.建立全国商业联盟，大幅提升内需和商品价格。: Establish a national trade alliance, greatly boosting domestic demand and goods prices.
backendLabels.建立全民动员体制，作为民族路线后期军事化基础；当前不会立刻给预算或点数。: Establish total mobilization as the foundation for later national-path militarization; no immediate budget or point effect.
backendLabels.建立再分配制度，解锁资本税相关政策，后续可调节财政与阶级压力。: Establish redistribution system, unlocking capital tax policies to adjust fiscal and class pressures later.
backendLabels.建立原料调拨和仓储制度，每回合获得更多可投产原材料，并保留少量工厂预算余量。: Establish raw material allocation and warehousing; gain more deployable materials per round with small factory budget reserve.
backendLabels.建立国家干预经济框架，解锁以工代赈等政策，用财政稳定内需和就业。: Establish state intervention framework, unlocking work relief policies to stabilize domestic demand and employment with fiscal power.
backendLabels.建立帝国级财政体系，三大预算池全面充裕，国内外市场全面繁荣。: Establish empire-level fiscal system; all three budget pools flourish, domestic and overseas markets boom.
backendLabels.建立救济制度，作为平等路线基础；当前不会立刻给预算或点数，主要铺垫福利与再分配改: Establish relief system as equality path foundation; no immediate budget or point effect, paving way for welfare and redistribution reforms.
backendLabels.建立现代海关体系，解锁贸易开闭政策，用于控制海外贸易和收入结构。: Establish modern customs system, unlocking trade open/close policies to control overseas trade and income structure.
backendLabels.建立秘密警察体系，作为压制与控制思潮的后期制度基础；当前不会立刻给预算或点数。: Establish secret police as late-game institutional foundation for ideology suppression; no immediate budget or point effect.
backendLabels.建立稳定轮班和维护班组，提高既有产线的实际产出，并继续扩充基础产能。: Establish stable shift and maintenance crews, increasing actual output of existing lines while expanding base capacity.
backendLabels.建立议会程序，开放请愿与国会系政策空间，让后续政策能通过制度渠道处理。: Establish parliamentary procedures, opening petition and congressional policy space for institutional policy processing.
backendLabels.建立资本市场和股份融资框架；当前不会立刻给预算或点数，主要作为自由路线的早期制度: Establish capital markets and equity financing; no immediate budget or point effect, mainly serves as early institutional foundation for the freedom path.
backendLabels.建立专业海外事务与商贸协调体系，扩大海外影响力。: Establish a professional overseas affairs and trade coordination system, expanding overseas influence.
backendLabels.建立高效殖民地行政体系，扩大海外影响力。: Establish a professional overseas affairs and trade coordination system, expanding overseas influence.
backendLabels.建设临时商贸枢纽，本回合扩展海外市场承接能力。: Build temporary trade hub, expanding overseas market capacity this round.
backendLabels.建设商贸枢纽，永久扩展海外市场承接上限。: Build a trade hub, permanently expanding overseas market capacity.
backendLabels.建设国家媒体机器，解锁政治鼓动类政策，用于主动调节思潮。: Build state media apparatus, unlocking political agitation policies to actively shape ideologies.
backendLabels.开展市场调研，了解国内消费者需求。: Conduct market research to understand domestic consumer demand.
backendLabels.开放民众请愿渠道，收入向消费池倾斜，自由主义上升。: Open petition channels; income shifts toward consumption pool, liberalism rises.
backendLabels.开放贸易口岸，提升全品类产能，收入向财政倾斜。: Open trade ports, increasing all-category production capacity; income shifts toward fiscal.
backendLabels.开辟新商贸通道，提升海外市场能力。: Open new trade channels, improving overseas market capability.
backendLabels.开辟新商贸通道，永久提升海外市场承接上限，并在本轮改善海外出售价格。: Open new trade channels, permanently increasing overseas market capacity and improving overseas sale prices this round.
backendLabels.形成完整工业综合体，新厂建设更便宜，原料供给和工厂预算同步增强。: Form complete industrial complex; new factory construction becomes cheaper, raw material supply and factory budget strengthen together.
backendLabels.扩充常备军编制；从本回合结算后开始，永久增加 1 军事力量上限。: Expand standing army; permanently increase military force cap by 1 starting from this round's settlement.
backendLabels.扩大海军规模，增强海外贸易护航能力。: Expand navy, enhancing overseas trade escort capability.
backendLabels.扩大选举权，提高大众政治参与和民族动员；会推高民族主义压力。: Expand suffrage, increasing popular political participation and national mobilization; raises nationalism pressure.
backendLabels.扩建民间手工作坊，增加后续手工业产能。: Expand civilian handicraft workshops, increasing future handicraft capacity.
backendLabels.扶持大型企业集团，把收入分配推向工厂并降低升级成本，但会显著激化平等主义。: Support large enterprise groups, shifting income distribution toward factories and lowering upgrade costs, but significantly intensifying egalitarianism.
backendLabels.承认工会组织，形成劳资谈判渠道；当前不会立刻给预算或点数，主要铺垫平等路线深化。: Recognize labor unions, forming labor negotiation channels; no immediate budget or point effect, mainly paves way for equality path deepening.
backendLabels.投入公共工程，同时抬高本回合内需承接和价格。: Invest in public works, simultaneously raising domestic demand capacity and prices this round.
backendLabels.投入公共工程，永久提高国内市场承接上限，并在本轮抬高收购价格。: Invest in public works, permanently increasing domestic market capacity and raising purchase prices this round.
backendLabels.投资乡村基建，大幅扩大本回合国内承接量。: Invest in rural infrastructure, significantly expanding domestic market capacity this round.
backendLabels.投资乡村基建，永久提高国内市场承接上限。: Invest in rural infrastructure, permanently increasing domestic market capacity.
backendLabels.投资基础设施，增加后续手工业产能。: Invest in infrastructure, increasing future handicraft capacity.
backendLabels.抽调工人与账房支援财政征收，本回合工厂最多少投入 2 份原材料，换取政府财政。: Reassign workers and accountants to support fiscal collection; factory input capped at 2 fewer raw materials this round in exchange for government fiscal.
backendLabels.推动产业升级，提升国内外商品附加值。: Promote industrial upgrading, increasing goods value-added domestically and overseas.
backendLabels.推动农业集体化，大幅降低升级成本，但会刺激自由主义反弹。: Promote agricultural collectivization, greatly reducing upgrade costs but provoking a liberalist backlash.
backendLabels.推动海军升级，大幅强化海外投射能力。: Promote naval modernization, greatly strengthening overseas projection capability.
backendLabels.推动海军升级，永久提高海外市场承接上限，并在本轮改善海外出售价格。: Promote naval modernization, permanently increasing overseas market capacity and improving overseas sale prices this round.
backendLabels.推动海外贸易，扩大本回合海外市场容量。: Promote overseas trade, expanding overseas market capacity this round.
backendLabels.推行内需扶持政策，把收入结构拉回国内消费方向。: Implement domestic demand support policies, pulling income structure back toward domestic consumption.
backendLabels.推行内需扶持政策，永久提高国内市场承接上限，并在本轮改善国内收购价格。: Implement domestic-demand support, permanently increasing domestic market capacity and improving domestic purchase prices this round.
backendLabels.推行标准化零件和工序，让产线改造更便宜，同时扩大基础产能。: Implement standardized parts and processes, making line upgrades cheaper while expanding base capacity.
backendLabels.推行现代财政制度，增加政府可用资金。: Implement modern fiscal system, increasing available government funds.
backendLabels.推进城市化进程，大规模扩张国内市场。: Advance urbanization, massively expanding the domestic market.
backendLabels.提高商业税，将更多工厂收入转入财政池，激化平等主义思潮。: Raise commercial tax, transferring more factory income to fiscal pool, intensifying egalitarianism.
backendLabels.提高行政效率，降低各部门运营成本。: Improve administrative efficiency, lowering department operating costs.
backendLabels.提高资本税，收入从工厂转向消费池，满足平等诉求但刺激自由主义。: Raise capital tax; income shifts from factories to consumption pool, satisfying egalitarian demands but stimulating liberalism.
backendLabels.支付加班和维护成本，本回合统一商品产出翻倍。加剧平等主义思潮。: Pay overtime and maintenance costs; this round's unified goods output doubles. Intensifies egalitarianism.
backendLabels.改为计划经济，锁定收入分配到国民消费与政府财政，牺牲工厂预算并刺激自由主义。: Switch to planned economy, locking income distribution to national consumption and government fiscal, sacrificing factory budget and stimulating liberalism.
backendLabels.政府出资兴办公共工程，提升手工业产能，收入向消费池倾斜。: Government-funded public works, increasing handicraft capacity; income shifts toward consumption pool.
backendLabels.政府推行税制改革，财政收入增加。: Government implements tax reform, increasing fiscal revenue.
backendLabels.政府补贴国内市场，扩大本回合国内承接量。: Government subsidizes the domestic market, expanding domestic capacity this round.
backendLabels.政府调控国内价格，提高本回合收购价格。: Government regulates domestic prices, raising purchase prices this round.
backendLabels.整顿分散工坊和账房流程，稳定扩大早期手工业产能。: Reorganize scattered workshops and accounting processes, steadily expanding early handicraft capacity.
backendLabels.暂停一部分产线做工艺训练，本回合投料上限降低，获得科技点。: Suspend some production lines for technical training; input cap decreases this round, tech points gained.
backendLabels.本回合同时提升国内与海外承接能力。: Simultaneously boost domestic and overseas market capacity this round.
backendLabels.本回合所有生产订单产出翻倍。: All production order output doubles this round.
backendLabels.棉花供应中断，国内滞销但海外需求激增。: Cotton supply disrupted; domestic overstock but overseas demand surges.
backendLabels.殖民地爆发反抗运动，海外控制力被削弱。: Overseas markets fluctuate, weakening trade capacity.
backendLabels.民族意识觉醒，军事热情高涨但内需受损。: National consciousness awakens; military fervor rises but domestic demand suffers.
backendLabels.民间手工业蓬勃发展，国内商品价格走高。: Civilian handicraft industry flourishes, domestic goods prices rise.
backendLabels.海外发现金矿，出口商品价格飙升。: Gold discovered overseas; export goods prices soar.
backendLabels.消耗政府财政建造新舰队，增强海军封锁能力。: Spend government fiscal to build new fleets, enhancing naval blockade capability.
backendLabels.消耗政府财政征募陆军部队。: Spend government fiscal to recruit army units.
backendLabels.消费主义席卷全国，国内市场爆发式增长。: Consumerism sweeps the nation; domestic market explodes with growth.
backendLabels.追加消费补贴，永久提高国内市场承接上限，并在本轮提高收购价格。: Add consumer subsidies, permanently increasing domestic market capacity and raising purchase prices this round.
backendLabels.动用行政力组织本轮内需补贴，扩大国内承接量。: Spend administrative power to organize domestic-demand subsidies this round, expanding domestic capacity.
backendLabels.动用行政力组织内需补贴，永久提高国内市场承接上限。: Spend administrative power on domestic-demand subsidies, permanently increasing domestic market capacity.
backendLabels.动用行政力协调贸易渠道，扩大本回合海外市场容量。: Spend administrative power to coordinate trade channels, expanding overseas market capacity this round.
backendLabels.动用行政力协调贸易渠道，永久提高海外市场承接上限。: Spend administrative power coordinating trade channels, permanently increasing overseas market capacity.
backendLabels.动用行政力协调贸易渠道，永久提高海外市场承接上限，并在本轮提高海外出售价格。: Spend administrative power coordinating trade channels, permanently increasing overseas market capacity.
backendLabels.动用行政力调控本轮国内收购价格。: Spend administrative power to regulate domestic purchase prices this round.
backendLabels.由工厂组织矿场、林场与运输线，立刻补充本回合可用原材料。: Factory-organized mines, forests and transport lines immediately replenish available raw materials this round.
backendLabels.研习现代军事理论，提升军事投射能力。: Study modern military theory, enhancing military projection capability.
backendLabels.确立海上霸权，大幅扩展海外贸易版图。: Establish naval supremacy, greatly expanding overseas trade territory.
backendLabels.自由贸易思潮席卷全球，海外市场大幅开放。: Free trade ideology sweeps the globe; overseas markets open dramatically.
backendLabels.苏伊士运河通航，全球贸易格局剧变。: Suez Canal opens, dramatically reshaping global trade patterns.
backendLabels.裁减军队编制，回笼财政资金，军事上限降低。: Reduce army size, recovering fiscal funds; military cap decreases.
backendLabels.跨洋电报网络建成，海外贸易信息畅通。: Transoceanic telegraph network completed; overseas trade information flows freely.
backendLabels.转向法西斯国家形态，压低民族主义革命压力，同时封锁自由和平等终局路线。: Turn to fascist state form, suppressing nationalist revolutionary pressure while blocking freedom and equality endgame paths.
backendLabels.转向苏维埃国家形态，锁定平等路线，并排斥自由与民族终局路线。: Turn to Soviet state form, locking the equality path and excluding freedom and national endgame paths.
backendLabels.追加消费补贴，同时提高本回合国内承接量和收购价格。: Add consumer subsidies, simultaneously increasing domestic capacity and purchase prices this round.
backendLabels.通过媒体鼓动民族情绪，提升民族主义，抑制平等主义。: Stir nationalist sentiment through media, boosting nationalism and suppressing egalitarianism.
backendLabels.金融恐慌蔓延，各项预算全面紧缩。: Financial panic spreads; all budgets tighten.
backendLabels.钢铁冶炼技术突破，重工业迎来黄金期。: Steel smelting breakthrough; heavy industry enters a golden age.
backendLabels.铁路建设高潮，机械化工业获得科技红利。: Railway construction boom; mechanized industry gains tech dividends.
backendLabels.降低商业税，收入更多流向工厂，缓和平等主义激进。: Lower commercial tax; more income flows to factories, easing egalitarian radicalism.
backendLabels.降低资本税，收入从消费池转向工厂，刺激投资但激化平等主义。: Lower capital tax; income shifts from consumption pool to factories, stimulating investment but intensifying egalitarianism.
backendLabels.限制工时以缓和劳工激进情绪，但全品类产能下降，短期工业能力会受损。: Limit working hours to ease labor radicalism, but all-category capacity drops, hurting short-term industrial capability.
backendLabels.限制进口替代品，提高本回合国内承接量和收购价格。: Restrict import substitutes, increasing domestic capacity and purchase prices this round.
backendLabels.限制进口替代品，永久提高国内市场承接上限，并在本轮提高收购价格。: Restrict import substitutes, permanently increasing domestic market capacity and raising purchase prices this round.
backendLabels.霍乱爆发，国内消费萎缩，民众呼吁社会改革。: Cholera outbreak; domestic consumption shrinks, public demands social reform.
backendLabels.霍乱爆发，国内消费承接下降，平等主义思潮上升；本事件不改变行政力。: Cholera outbreak lowers domestic market capacity and raises egalitarian pressure; this event does not change admin power.
backendLabels.革命浪潮席卷欧洲，政府财政受创但改革呼声高涨。: Revolutionary waves sweep Europe; government fiscal takes a hit but reform demands rise.
backendLabels.风调雨顺，国内市场消费力增强。: Favorable weather strengthens domestic market consumption.
backendLabels.鼓励私人资本投入研发，每回合额外推进研究进度，收入向工厂倾斜。: Encourage private capital investment in R&D, advancing research progress each round; income shifts toward factories.
backendLabels.鼓励私人资本投入研发，本轮额外推进研究进度，收入向工厂倾斜。: Encourage private capital investment in R&D, advancing research progress this round; income shifts toward factories.
backendLabels.抽调工人与账房支援财政征收，本回合工厂最多少投入 2 份原材料，换取政府财政。: Reassign workers and accountants to support fiscal collection; factory input capped at 2 fewer raw materials this round in exchange for government fiscal. Effect: Input Cap This Round -2, Government Budget +4.
backendLabels.由工厂组织矿场、林场与运输线，立刻补充本回合可用原材料。 效果：原材料 +4。: Factory-organized mines, forests and transport lines immediately replenish available raw materials this round. Effect: Raw Materials +4.
backendLabels.支付加班和维护成本，本回合统一商品产出翻倍。加剧平等主义思潮。 效果：产出倍率: Pay overtime and maintenance costs; this round's unified goods output doubles. Intensifies egalitarianism. Effect: Output Multiplier +2.
backendLabels.暂停一部分产线做工艺训练，本回合投料上限降低，获得科技点。 效果：本回合投料上限: Suspend some production lines for technical training; input cap decreases this round, tech points gained. Effect: Input Cap This Round -1, Tech Points +1.
backendLabels.消耗政府财政征募陆军部队。 效果：陆军 +1。: Spend government fiscal to recruit army units. Effect: Army +1.
backendLabels.消耗政府财政建造新舰队，增强海军封锁能力。 效果：舰队 +1。: Spend government fiscal to build new fleets, enhancing naval blockade capability. Effect: Fleets +1.
backendLabels.建立资本市场和股份融资框架，提高政府处理财政、市场与产业事务的行政力上限。: Establish capital markets and equity financing frameworks, increasing the government admin-capacity ceiling for fiscal, market, and industrial affairs.
backendLabels.建立议会程序，开放请愿与国会系政策空间，并进一步提高行政力上限。: Establish parliamentary procedures, opening petition and parliamentary policy space while further increasing admin capacity.

reformDesc.constitution: Constrain state power with a constitution, reducing all three radical ideologies and revolutionary risk.
reformDesc.stock_market: Establish capital markets and equity financing; no immediate budget or point effect, mainly serves as early institutional foundation for the freedom path.
reformDesc.parliament: Establish parliamentary procedures, opening petition and congressional policy space for institutional policy processing.
reformDesc.patent_system: Protect inventions and technical property rights, providing an institutional foundation for private R&D and industrial upgrade policies.
reformDesc.representative_state: Complete representative transformation, greatly easing all three ideological pressures and reducing revolutionary risk.
reformDesc.universal_suffrage: Expand suffrage, increasing popular political participation and national mobilization; raises nationalism pressure.
reformDesc.trust_system: Support large enterprise groups, shifting income distribution toward factories and lowering upgrade costs, but significantly intensifying egalitarianism.
reformDesc.social_relief: Establish relief system as equality path foundation; no immediate budget or point effect, paving way for welfare and redistribution reforms.
reformDesc.eight_hour_day: Limit working hours to ease labor radicalism, but all-category production capacity declines, short-term industrial capability suffers.
reformDesc.social_redistribution: Establish redistribution system, unlocking capital tax policies to adjust fiscal and class pressures later.
reformDesc.labor_union: Recognize labor unions, forming labor negotiation channels; no immediate budget or point effect, mainly paves way for equality path deepening.
reformDesc.soviet_state: Transition to Soviet state form, locking in equality path and excluding freedom and national endgame paths.
reformDesc.collective_farms: Promote agricultural collectivization, greatly reducing upgrade costs but provoking a liberalist backlash.
reformDesc.planned_economy: Switch to planned economy, locking income distribution to national consumption and government fiscal, sacrificing factory budget and stimulating liberalism.
reformDesc.compulsory_education: Establish compulsory education system as institutional foundation for long-term R&D and national governance capacity.
reformDesc.state_media: Build state media apparatus, unlocking political agitation policies to actively shape ideologies.
reformDesc.modern_customs: Establish modern customs system, unlocking trade open/close policies to control overseas trade and income structure.
reformDesc.keynesianism: Establish state intervention economic framework, unlocking work relief and other policies, using fiscal power to stabilize domestic demand and employment.
reformDesc.fascist_state: Transition to fascist state form, suppressing nationalist revolutionary pressure while blocking freedom and equality endgame paths.
reformDesc.total_mobilization: Establish total mobilization as the foundation for later national-path militarization; no immediate budget or point effect.
reformDesc.secret_police: Establish secret police as late-game institutional foundation for ideology suppression; no immediate budget or point effect.
